htf_analysis.ozet: 4H ve 1H tam uyumlu BULL trend, 5M/15M FLAT karsi yondeki potansiyel pullback firsati olusturuyor

sl_basis: 4H VAL (63492.66) - 12 = 63480.66 => Risk kontrol icin entry-100 uygulanarak SL=63380.66 (minimum koruma aktif, 4H VAL uzaklik kontrolu)
tp_basis: TP1: 1H vPOC (63265.0) | TP2: 4H VAH (63855.52) - trend tesisine gore hiz kazanma hedefleri
absorption: Hacim profil VAL/VAH bandinde dengeli yogunluk, 4H trend icinde fiyat acceptance bolgesinde konumlu
dom_observation: DOM dengesi yakin (bid:673 vs ask:679, ratio 0.99), ask dominansi minimal - guvenli giris bolgesinde
session_bias: Session delta pozitif +6290, buy_volume (51753) > sell_volume (45362), ratio 1.14 - alim baskisi net
reasoning: 4H+1H BULL uyumu + delta_sum_5bars=81 (>80 threshold) + session pozitif CVD, fiyat 4H VAL yakini (entry 63319 vs VAL 63492), risk/reward optimize: (63319-63380)=-61 SL vs (63855-63319)=+536 TP2 = 1:8.8 ratio
